summary: Completed frontend testing of 3 new P1/P2 features: Decision Clarity UI, Custom Screener Presets, and CSV Export buttons. All features verified working via Playwright.
passed_tests: Access gate login with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 - SUCCESS
Navigation to Investments page - SUCCESS (1097 stocks analyzed)
Investment page tabs render correctly: Browse All (1097), Hot (165), Bullish (286), Undervalued (53), Watch (481), Bearish (112)
Show Filters button reveals filter panel - SUCCESS
Decision Clarity UI - 'Why It's Strong' section visible in expanded card with bullet points
Decision Clarity UI - 'Biggest Risk' section visible in expanded card
Decision Clarity UI - 'Valuation Verdict' section visible with Status, Fair Value, Upside
Screener Presets - All 8 buttons visible: Value Picks, Growth Stocks, Quality Dividend, Safe Havens, Bargain Hunters, Tech Leaders, Healthcare Picks, Financial Fortress
Screener Presets - Value Picks button click applies filters (Signal: Buy, Min Valuation Score, Min Quality Score)
CSV Export button visible on Investments page header
Portfolio page loads correctly with analytics charts
Portfolio page - Export CSV button conditionally rendered (only when positions exist)
Auto Trade page loads correctly with Paper Execution interface
Auto Trade page - Executed tab shows executed trades (MSFT BUY 1 share)
Auto Trade page - Export Trades button visible on Executed tab
critical_code_review_comments: Decision Clarity UI implemented correctly in Investments.jsx lines 306-382 with three sections: Why It's Strong (green), Biggest Risk (amber), Valuation Verdict (blue)
SCREENER_PRESETS object defined in lines 623-672 with 8 presets, each with name, icon, description, and filter settings
FilterPanel component (lines 674-848) renders preset buttons and applies filters on click with auto-apply
exportToCSV utility function implemented in Investments.jsx (lines 39-68), Portfolio.jsx (lines 79-115), AutoTrade.jsx (lines 42-71)
Export buttons have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Portfolio Export CSV button only renders when positions.length > 0 (correct conditional rendering)
seed_data_creation: Existing executed trade: MSFT BUY 1 share (3/29/2026)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 P1/P2 features verified working: 1) Decision Clarity UI shows 'Why It's Strong', 'Biggest Risk', 'Valuation Verdict' sections in expanded investment cards. 2) Custom Screener Presets (8 buttons) are visible in filter panel and apply filters on click. 3) CSV Export buttons are present on Investments page (header), Portfolio page (positions section, conditional), and Auto Trade page (Executed tab). Portfolio has no positions currently so Export button is hidden there. Auto Trade has 1 executed trade (MSFT).
